content.text:
End-to-end (E2E) pipelines are integral to various domains, including software development, artificial intelligence, and autonomous systems. Below are authoritative and recent sources that provide insights into E2E pipelines across different fields:

1. **E2E DevOps Pipeline with GitLab**: This resource from IBM demonstrates the implementation of an E2E DevOps pipeline using GitLab, highlighting integration across various phases of the application lifecycle. ([mediacenter.ibm.com](https://mediacenter.ibm.com/media/E2E%2BDevOps%2BPipeline%2Bwith%2BGitLab/1_gds3ux8t?utm_source=openai))

2. **Building End-to-End DevOps Pipelines: Best Practices for CI/CD Success**: An article from CloudBees discussing best practices for developing, building, testing, and deploying software within E2E DevOps pipelines. ([cloudbees.com](https://www.cloudbees.com/blog/building-e2e-devops-pipelines?utm_source=openai))

3. **E2E Process Automation Leveraging Generative AI and IDP-Based Automation Agent: A Case Study on Corporate Expense Processing**: A research paper exploring the integration of generative AI and Intelligent Document Processing (IDP) in automating corporate expense processing. ([researchgate.net](https://www.researchgate.net/publication/396749656_E2E_Process_Automation_Leveraging_Generative_AI_and_IDP-Based_Automation_Agent_A_Case_Study_on_Corporate_Expense_Processing?utm_source=openai))

4. **E2E DevOps Practice: Managing Requirements**: Huawei's best practices for managing requirements within an E2E DevOps framework, emphasizing agile development methodologies. ([support.huaweicloud.com](https://support.huaweicloud.com/intl/en-us/bestpractice-projectman/codeartsreq_practice_1037.html?utm_source=openai))

5. **E2E Data Engineering Project (Food Delivery App)**: A Udemy course that guides learners through building an E2E data pipeline for a food delivery application using Snowflake. ([udemy.com](https://www.udemy.com/course/snowflake-e2e-data-engineering-project-food-delivery-app/?utm_source=openai))

6. **Feature-Driven End-To-End Test Generation**: A research paper presenting AutoE2E, an approach that leverages Large Language Models to automate the generation of semantically meaningful feature-driven E2E test cases for web applications. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.01894?utm_source=openai))

7. **E2E Case Study: Supply Chain and Logistics**: A case study by DKSH showcasing the implementation of an E2E integration backbone to streamline global business processes. ([uml.org](https://uml.org/uml_success_stories/2008-06-10_E2E_Case_Study_on_DKSH_Pegasus.pdf?utm_source=openai))

8. **Appsurify B2B Case Studies & Customer Successes**: A collection of case studies demonstrating how Appsurify's TestBrain delivers software development teams test results on a per-change basis in the CI pipeline. ([casestudies.com](https://www.casestudies.com/company/appsurify?utm_source=openai))

9. **Auto-Remediation Pipelines for Autoscaling Groups Validated via E2E Chaos Tests**: A discussion on best practices for auto-remediation pipelines in autoscaling groups, validated through E2E chaos tests. ([umatechnology.org](https://umatechnology.org/auto-remediation-pipelines-for-autoscaling-groups-validated-via-e2e-chaos-tests/?utm_source=openai))

10. **End-to-End Speech to Intent Prediction to Improve E-commerce Customer Support Voicebot in Hindi and English**: A research paper discussing an E2E speech-to-intent model for customer support voicebots in a bilingual setting. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2211.07710?utm_source=openai))

These sources offer comprehensive insights into the design, implementation, and optimization of E2E pipelines across various applications.

output_text:
End-to-end (E2E) pipelines are integral to various domains, including software development, artificial intelligence, and autonomous systems. Below are authoritative and recent sources that provide insights into E2E pipelines across different fields:

1. **E2E DevOps Pipeline with GitLab**: This resource from IBM demonstrates the implementation of an E2E DevOps pipeline using GitLab, highlighting integration across various phases of the application lifecycle. ([mediacenter.ibm.com](https://mediacenter.ibm.com/media/E2E%2BDevOps%2BPipeline%2Bwith%2BGitLab/1_gds3ux8t?utm_source=openai))

2. **Building End-to-End DevOps Pipelines: Best Practices for CI/CD Success**: An article from CloudBees discussing best practices for developing, building, testing, and deploying software within E2E DevOps pipelines. ([cloudbees.com](https://www.cloudbees.com/blog/building-e2e-devops-pipelines?utm_source=openai))

3. **E2E Process Automation Leveraging Generative AI and IDP-Based Automation Agent: A Case Study on Corporate Expense Processing**: A research paper exploring the integration of generative AI and Intelligent Document Processing (IDP) in automating corporate expense processing. ([researchgate.net](https://www.researchgate.net/publication/396749656_E2E_Process_Automation_Leveraging_Generative_AI_and_IDP-Based_Automation_Agent_A_Case_Study_on_Corporate_Expense_Processing?utm_source=openai))

4. **E2E DevOps Practice: Managing Requirements**: Huawei's best practices for managing requirements within an E2E DevOps framework, emphasizing agile development methodologies. ([support.huaweicloud.com](https://support.huaweicloud.com/intl/en-us/bestpractice-projectman/codeartsreq_practice_1037.html?utm_source=openai))

5. **E2E Data Engineering Project (Food Delivery App)**: A Udemy course that guides learners through building an E2E data pipeline for a food delivery application using Snowflake. ([udemy.com](https://www.udemy.com/course/snowflake-e2e-data-engineering-project-food-delivery-app/?utm_source=openai))

6. **Feature-Driven End-To-End Test Generation**: A research paper presenting AutoE2E, an approach that leverages Large Language Models to automate the generation of semantically meaningful feature-driven E2E test cases for web applications. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.01894?utm_source=openai))

7. **E2E Case Study: Supply Chain and Logistics**: A case study by DKSH showcasing the implementation of an E2E integration backbone to streamline global business processes. ([uml.org](https://uml.org/uml_success_stories/2008-06-10_E2E_Case_Study_on_DKSH_Pegasus.pdf?utm_source=openai))

8. **Appsurify B2B Case Studies & Customer Successes**: A collection of case studies demonstrating how Appsurify's TestBrain delivers software development teams test results on a per-change basis in the CI pipeline. ([casestudies.com](https://www.casestudies.com/company/appsurify?utm_source=openai))

9. **Auto-Remediation Pipelines for Autoscaling Groups Validated via E2E Chaos Tests**: A discussion on best practices for auto-remediation pipelines in autoscaling groups, validated through E2E chaos tests. ([umatechnology.org](https://umatechnology.org/auto-remediation-pipelines-for-autoscaling-groups-validated-via-e2e-chaos-tests/?utm_source=openai))

10. **End-to-End Speech to Intent Prediction to Improve E-commerce Customer Support Voicebot in Hindi and English**: A research paper discussing an E2E speech-to-intent model for customer support voicebots in a bilingual setting. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2211.07710?utm_source=openai))

These sources offer comprehensive insights into the design, implementation, and optimization of E2E pipelines across various applications.
